## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Variant constants are UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g. `SVG_VARIANTS`, `PATH_VARIANTS`)
- [ ] Component uses `forwardRef` with `LiveIconHandle`
- [ ] Component uses `LiveIconProps` (not a custom props interface)
- [ ] Animation has `normal` and `animate` states
- [ ] No hardcoded colors (uses `color` prop / `currentColor`)
- [ ] Icon name is kebab-case, component is PascalCase + `Icon` suffix
